title: eurybia shreberi
intro: Eurybia shreberi, also known as the New York astrolabe or Eurybia shreberi, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to North America. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eurybia shreberi include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and improve urinary function. Eurybia shreberi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various methods of consumption.
